      • NEW_LINE

        public static final java.lang.String NEW_LINE
        Constant for the line break which is used by the operating system.

        Do not use \n!

      • computeProjectSubPath

        protected java.lang.String computeProjectSubPath(java.lang.String modelDir)
        Computes the project specific sub path of the output directory (directory) in which the generated files will be stored.
        Parameters:
        modelDir - The path to the source files of the performed Proof.
        Returns:
        The computed sub path.
